methods.name: RECORD

methods.summary: Aggregated results, sorted slowest-first (total time descending) - the

methods.summary: Human-readable, slowest-first report (for a log, the console, or an ALV

methods.summary: Clear all measurements (e.g. between runs).

methods.summary: Message-class (T100) message with ERROR severity.

methods.summary: Message-class (T100) message with WARNING severity.

methods.name: INFO
methods.summary: Message-class (T100) message with INFORMATION severity.

methods.name: SUCCESS
methods.summary: Message-class (T100) message with SUCCESS severity.
